ygevent.Name: Yoga-1
ygevent.Description: Join us for a rejuvenating yoga session led by our experienced instructor. This class is suitable for all levels.

ygevent.Name: Yoga-2
ygevent.Description: Experience the benefits of yoga in this evening class designed to help you unwind and relax after a long day.

AboutUs.content: Welcome to SriVibhaya Yoga, where we are dedicated to helping you achieve physical and mental well-being through the practice of yoga. Our mission is to create a supportive and inclusive community where individuals of all ages and skill levels can explore the transformative power of yoga.At Sri Vibhaya Yoga, we believe that yoga is not just a physical practice but a holistic approach to health and wellness. Our experienced instructors are passionate about guiding you on your yoga journey, whether you're a beginner or an advanced practitioner. We offer a variety of classes, workshops, and events designed to meet your unique needs and goals.Our studio is a serene and welcoming space where you can escape the stresses of daily life and connect with your inner self. We are committed to providing a safe and nurturing environment for all our students, fostering a sense of community and support. Join us at Sri Vibhaya Yoga and embark on a journey of self-discovery, growth, and transformation through the practice of yoga.
